message:
test(procinfo): expand from 18 to 41 tests for process info and sysctl parsing (wa-30lsa)

Add 23 new tests: deeply nested children, mixed valid/empty executables,
many children at same level, exe filename deduplication, field accessibility,
clone preservation, distinct status debug strings, live process name/executable/ppid
verification, cwd-matches-env, nonexistent PID returns None, flatten includes
current exe. macOS sysctl parser: single/zero/many args, padding, spaces,
equals in args, non-UTF8 exe path, argc mismatch, too-small buffer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
